_shorthelp: Input_(Bootstrap_5) is a field on an Input-group control. Bootstrap5.

_datalist.desc: List of possible predefined values, one per line.

_passwordToggle.desc: Option to toggle plaintext for Password fields.

_step.desc: A value the input has to be a multiple of. Use 1 for integer only

_min.desc: For inputType Number, the minimum value. For date, the earliest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_max.desc: For inputType Number, the maximum value. For date, the latest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_htmltemplate: {if itemType[:5]=='input'}      "<input id={id} class='form-control {class}' style='{style}' type={inputType} placeholder='{placeholder}' {if attributes<>''} {attributes!j}{/if}{if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}{_bsTextatr!i}{if min<>''} min='{min}'{/if}{if max<>''} max='{max}' {/if}{if step<>''}step={step} {/if}{if inputmode<>''}inputmode={inputmode} {/if}{if value<>''}value='{value!b}' {/if}>",{/if}
{if itemType[:5]=='input' and passwordToggle=='true'} "",{/if}
{if itemType=='span'} "''} name='{name}' {/if}>{value}",{/if}

{if itemType=='textarea'}      "<textarea id={id} style='{style}' class='form-control {class}' placeholder='{placeholder}'{if attributes<>''} {attributes!j}{/if}{if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}>{value}</textarea>",{/if}
{if itemType=='button'}      "<button id={id} style='{style}' class='btn btn-outline-secondary {class}' type='button'{if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}>{value}</button>",{/if}
{if itemType=='checkbox' or itemType=='radio'}      "<div class='input-group-text {class} {if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}'>",{/if}
{if itemType=='checkbox'}      "<input id={id} style='{style}' class='form-check-input mt-0 {class}' type='checkbox' value='' {if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}>",{/if}
{if itemType=='radio'}      "<input id={id} style='{style}' class='form-check-input mt-0 {class}' type='radio' value='' {if name<>''} name='{name}' {/if}>",{/if}
